description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a driveway, garage, and several mature trees. The house features a prominent front entryway with a set of steps leading up to a central door, flanked by symmetrical windows on both floors. The roof is a classic gable style, sloping on two sides, and the exterior walls appear to be finished in a light-colored material. A driveway leads to an attached garage on one side, with two cars parked in front. The property is landscaped with a mix of trees and open yard space, creating a typical residential neighborhood setting. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, and the overall design is simple and functional, reflecting a Colonial Revival architectural influence.
description: A two-story, gable-roofed suburban house with symmetrical windows, a central entryway, attached garage, and surrounding trees. The exterior is light-colored and the property includes a driveway and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, symmetrical windows, driveway, garage, and several trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the garage, driveway with parked cars, and the side elevation of the house with additional trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, more trees, and the open yard area behind the building.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the sloped roof, side yard, and a cluster of trees, with less emphasis on the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, small porch, and symmetrical flanking windows
